languages.original_text: "Just think, we have visited a fully functional Necron tomb of titanic proportions! If only I had had the chance to touch upon its secrets, or even to induce that powerful xenos into a more productive conversation..."

languages.text: "Подумать только, мы побывали в полностью функциональной гробнице некронов титанических масштабов! Если бы у меня была возможность прикоснуться к ее тайнам или даже склонить того могущественного ксеноса к более содержательной беседе..."

"Just think, we have visited a fully functional Necron tomb of titanic proportions! If only I'd had the chance to touch upon its secrets, or even to induce that powerful xenos into a more productive conversation..."
languages.original_text: "Подумать только, мы побывали в полностью функциональной гробнице некронов титанических масштабов! Если бы у меня была возможность прикоснуться к ее тайнам или даже склонить того могущественного ксеноса к более содержательной беседе..."

"Just think, we have visited a fully functional Necron tomb of titanic proportions! If only I had had the chance to touch upon its secrets, or even to induce that powerful xenos into a more productive conversation..."

languages.text: 「ネクロティル族の者が、その奇抜な目的のために使う、驚くべき場所。彼の技術は、オムニシアの奉仕に非常に役立つだろう」
languages.original_text: "That astonishing place that the member of the Necrontyr uses for his eccentric ends. His technology would be extremely useful in the service of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: ネクロティル族の者が、その奇抜な目的のために使う、驚くべき場所。彼の技術は、オムニシアの奉仕に非常に役立つだろう。

languages.text: « Imaginez, nous avons exploré un gigantesque tombeau nécron parfaitement opérationnel ! Si j'avais eu l'occasion d'examiner ses secrets ou même d'avoir une conversation plus productive avec ce puissant xénos... »
languages.original_text: "Just think, we have visited a fully functional Necron tomb of titanic proportions! If only I had had the chance to touch upon its secrets, or even to induce that powerful xenos into a more productive conversation..."

traits.locale_text: « Imaginez, nous avons exploré un gigantesque tombeau nécron parfaitement opérationnel ! Si j'avais eu l'occasion d'examiner ses secrets ou même d'avoir une conversation plus productive avec ce puissant xénos... »

languages.text: "Stellt Euch vor, wir haben ein voll funktionsfähiges Necrongrab mit titanischen Ausmaßen besucht. Hätte ich doch nur die Chance gehabt, seine Geheimnisse zu lüften oder diesen mächtigen Xenos in ein etwas produktiveres Gespräch zu verwickeln ..."
languages.original_text: "Just think, we have visited a fully functional Necron tomb of titanic proportions! If only I had had the chance to touch upon its secrets, or even to induce that powerful xenos into a more productive conversation..."

traits.locale_text: "Stellt Euch vor, wir haben ein voll funktionsfähiges Necrongrab mit titanischen Ausmaßen besucht. Hätte ich doch nur die Chance gehabt, seine Geheimnisse zu lüften oder diesen mächtigen Xenos in ein etwas produktiveres Gespräch zu verwickeln ..."

languages.text: "Düşünsenize, devasa boyutlarda tam işlevsel bir Nekron mezarını ziyaret ettik! Keşke onun sırlarına dokunma ya da o güçlü zenoyu daha verimli bir sohbete teşvik etme şansım olsaydı..."
languages.original_text: "Just think, we have visited a fully functional Necron tomb of titanic proportions! If only I had had the chance to touch upon its secrets, or even to induce that powerful xenos into a more productive conversation..."

traits.locale_text: "Düşünsenize, devasa boyutlarda tam işlevsel bir Nekron mezarını ziyaret ettik! Keşke onun sırlarına dokunma ya da o güçlü zenoyu daha verimli bir sohbete teşvik etme şansım olsaydı..."

languages.text: «Piénsenlo, ¡acabamos de visitar una monumental tumba de Necrones! Ojalá hubiera tenido ocasión de estudiar sus secretos, o de inducir a ese poderoso xenos a participar en una conversación más productiva...».
languages.original_text: "Just think, we have visited a fully functional Necron tomb of titanic proportions! If only I had had the chance to touch upon its secrets, or even to induce that powerful xenos into a more productive conversation..."

traits.locale_text: «Piénsenlo, ¡acabamos de visitar una monumental tumba de Necrones! Ojalá hubiera tenido ocasión de estudiar sus secretos, o de inducir a ese poderoso xenos a participar en una conversación más productiva...».

languages.text: “想想看吧，我们竟然进入了一座依然正常运作、规模堪比泰坦的太空死灵墓穴！要是我能有机会一探其中的奥秘，或者引导那个强大的异形进行一场更加富有成效的交流……”
languages.original_text: "Just think, we have visited a fully functional Necron tomb of titanic proportions! If only I had had the chance to touch upon its secrets, or even to induce that powerful xenos into a more productive conversation..."
